name: Peanut Butter Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together margarine, peanut butter and sugars in a bowl until creamy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla to the mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking powder.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the sugar mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Spread the batter onto a small cookie sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Top with chocolate chips.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 3 minutes.
8. Swirl the chocolate chips into the bar using a spatula.
9. Continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until set.
10. Allow the bar to cool completely before cutting and serving.
